items.title: Sales Manager, Hoberg & Driesch Finland Oy
text: Built and developed the company’s B2B client base in the Estonian market through outbound sales and business development.
Managed the full sales cycle, including pricing, negotiations, and long-term client relationship management.
Organized and conducted client meetings while developing and maintaining business partnerships.
Monitored orders and transaction progress, proactively identifying risks and ensuring a smooth delivery process.

items.title: Account Assistant, ArcelorMittal Commercial Baltics OÜ (ArcelorMittal – one of the world’s largest steel producers)
text: Managed customer orders throughout the entire lifecycle, from production planning to final delivery, ensuring smooth information flow between all parties involved.
Coordinated daily communication between clients, production, and logistics teams to ensure deadlines were met and the supply chain operated efficiently.
Prepared price quotations and internal reports, supporting the sales process and data-driven decision making.
Resolved customer claims and operational issues, identifying practical solutions while maintaining strong client relationships.

items.title: Chemistry, Medicine and Foodstuffs Examiner, Estonian Patent Office
text: Assessed patent applications for compliance with legal requirements and evaluated the quality and completeness of the submitted documentation.
Conducted comprehensive patent searches in international databases to evaluate the novelty and inventive step of inventions.
Analyzed technical and scientific information and prepared official decisions and correspondence based on the findings.
Advised patent applicants and explained the patent examination process and related requirements.
